meme.title: If there had been a cat drawn on the sign, he would have known

headlines.h: Weather Alert: POV: You told her you’re more of a dog person
headlines.b: Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.

headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “mom… i need help"
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).
The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.
Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-05-08)
